meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: User Onboarding to Debug Code Faster
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Use structured user onboarding and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster and impress your clients today.
content.answer_block: When you can't debug your code, the bottleneck is often poor user flow visibility. By implementing structured user onboarding, you force clear data states and predictable user journeys. This reduces edge-case complexity, allowing tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to isolate, diagnose, and resolve logic errors instantly for your clients.
content.intro:
The screen is glowing, the deadline is looming, and your code is a black box of cryptic errors. You’ve been staring at the same function for three hours, and the client is expecting a demo by morning. That sinking feeling of being stuck is the silent killer of every freelancer’s profit margin.

But here is the secret: most bugs aren't just 'bad code'—they are symptoms of chaotic user states. By shifting your focus to high-fidelity user onboarding, you don't just guide your users; you define the exact state your application must be in at every step. This clarity transforms debugging from a blind hunt into a surgical procedure.

steps.title: Define User State Transitions
steps.description: Map every onboarding step to a specific application state. This ensures that if a bug occurs, you know exactly which stage of the user journey failed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current onboarding flow. Create a state machine diagram that maps every user action to a specific data state in my backend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'map state transitions for onboarding.tsx'

steps.title: Implement Telemetry Hooks
steps.description: Inject logging at every onboarding junction to capture the user's progress. This provides the context you lack when a bug report comes in.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable telemetry hook for my React onboarding steps that logs user state and potential errors to console.

steps.title: Automate Error Boundary Testing
steps.description: Wrap your onboarding components in error boundaries so that one bad state doesn't crash the entire client experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an ErrorBoundary component specifically for my onboarding flow that captures state and prompts for user feedback on failure.

steps.title: Simulate Onboarding Edge Cases
steps.description: Use AI to generate mock user data that triggers common failure points during the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate 10 edge-case user onboarding scenarios, including missing fields and interrupted network requests, for testing.

steps.title: Deploy Hotfix via Claude Code
steps.description: Use the gathered telemetry and error reports to have Claude Code refactor the problematic onboarding logic in one pass.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent error logs from my onboarding flow. Identify the root cause and propose a refactor for the problematic component.

pro_tips: Always log the 'previous state' before an onboarding step executes to see exactly where the data drift occurs.
Use feature flags to roll out onboarding updates so you can kill a buggy flow without rolling back your entire production build.
Treat onboarding as a state machine: if the user isn't in a valid state, redirect them to the last known 'good' step automatically.
Inject a 'Debug Mode' toggle in your development environment that displays the internal state variables directly on the UI.
Never ship onboarding without a 'Reset' button that clears local storage and state—it is your ultimate fallback for client bug reports.
content.next_steps: Integrate these patterns into your base project template so every new client project starts with built-in observability and robust onboarding architecture.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the same bugs and start shipping high-quality, professional code that keeps clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
